measured_entities.interpretation: Objective exercise capacity marker, but mechanism requires oxygen pulse, stroke volume, ventilation, muscle and effort context.
guardrails: Do not infer mechanism from low VO2 alone.

measured_entities.interpretation: Autonomic/cardiac rate response and recovery layer distinct from resting HRV.
Useful for distinguishing pulmonary/cardiac/peripheral/metabolic or perceptual limitations.
guardrails: CPET thresholds are not subjective RPE.

measured_entities.interpretation: Good screening and group-level tracking; limited for precise individual VO2 without CPET.
guardrails: 6MWT alone should not assign individual VO2peak with precision.

measured_entities.interpretation: Tracks response to exercise countermeasures/rehabilitation when protocol and adherence are known.
guardrails: Spaceflight deconditioning differs from chronic disease physiology.

negative_or_uncertain_findings.claim: 6MWT accurately predicts individual VO2peak for clinical decisions.
Chronotropic incompetence always indicates cardiac disease.

summary.overall_assessment: Exercise physiology tree is strong. CPET-derived VO2, thresholds, ventilatory efficiency, HR dynamics and two-day CPET provide a mechanism-sensitive layer for deconditioning, cardiopulmonary limitation, autonomic limitation, PEM and countermeasure response.
